'''Valaqil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gurlanin]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]], and was an ally to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and [[Jinart]]'s mate. Valaqil was present at the [[Omega Squad]] [[Mission to Qiilura|mission]] briefing on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] before their departure to [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. While the clones tried to remove the colonists from Qiilura, their [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] blindly led them into a minefield trap laid by the colonists, who had faked their surrender. This forced Valaqil, who was mistakenly thought to be Jinart by Tur-Mukan, to lead them out of the minefield.
